_comment: Maps a specialty subfolder under a person to a Paperless tag, following the existing 'Category/Subcategory' convention already used in Paperless (Work/Payslip, Identity/Aadhar, ...). Several source folders collapse onto one tag - the folder tree grew organically and says the same thing two ways.
_default_comment: Files sitting directly under a person folder, with no specialty subfolder. The Phase 1 extractor reclassifies these once it reads them.
